rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Both the workflow YAML safety step AND kody engine's parseCommentInputs() block pipeline resume on non-COLLABORATOR/MEMBER/OWNER comment authors.","scope":"kody engine"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Authorization checks on comments prevent @kody approve from resuming paused pipelines when the approver lacks required GitHub association.","scope":"auth/pipeline"}]}
